sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84023" key="plw/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλώς</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, gen. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πλωτός, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πλώω</etym>) <sense id="n84023.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">swimmer,</tr_> name of a fish, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κεστρεύς</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:2:58:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.58.29</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
